scripts.title: The Call Behind the Call
scripts.draft:
[HOOK]
God calls quietly.
[TEACHING]
Vayikra opens with a whisper...
[APPLICATION]
Listen before you move.
[CTA]
Follow for more.

scripts.title: The First Breath
scripts.draft:
[HOOK]
Breathe.
[TEACHING]
In the beginning...
[APPLICATION]
Start now.
[CTA]
Follow.
